title: Daisy SMP Tweaks
body:
Daisy SMP Tweaks

Adds various tweaks for the Daisy SMP!

This mod adds various items, like the metal scaffolding, or others reserved for the server staff, and game mechanics like getting the regeneration effect when near campfires (the area becomes bigger when there's a hay block under it). --- ## Features - **Metal Scaffolding:** This block will be able to go further out than regular scaffolding can. - **Nether lantern:** A block that stores a beacon energy to be used later on, this block is capable of storing up to 5 hours of beacon charge. - **Block Detector:** If the blocks on the faces of the detector are the same and have the same blockstate the block detector outputs a redstone signal from every side except it's faces. - **Amethyst Bulb:** Basically a backport of the copper bulb from 1.21. - **Ladybrine Scythe:** This custom weapon is designed exclusively for server administrators to effectively manage disruptive behaviour. - **Campfires:** Users who approach campfires gain the regeneration effect. The area surrounding the campfire expands when hay bales are placed beneath it. - **Secret Spectator:** Spectators are not visible to non-operating players. - **Chat Minigames:** Randomly generated minigames are displayed on chat. These minigames include scramble, fill-in-the-blank, reverse word, and datapack. The datapack questions can be configured via the `data/daisy/chat_minigame_questions` directory, the chat minigames can be configured in `daisy/chat_minigames.json`. - **Anticheat:** really primitive but detects flagged mod ids and reports them to moderators through a discord webhook, the anticheat can be configured in `daisy/anticheat.json`. - **Homes:** The `/home`, `/sethome`, `/delhome`, `/homes`, `/setmaxhomes`, and `/spawn` commands are added, providing self-explanatory options for players to create and manage their homes. These homes are stored as components from the Cardinal Components API within each player’s data. - **TPA:** The `/tpa`, `/tpahere`, and `/tpaccept` commands enable players to request and accept teleportation requests from others. A 60-second cooldown is implemented for these commands via a gamerule. - **Warp:** The `/warp`, `/setwarp`, and `/removewarp` commands facilitate the management of warp portals. Operators can create and manage these portals, and players can teleport to them using the warp command. Warp portals are stored as components from the Cardinal Components API within the world’s (level) scoreboard. --- ## Support If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, feel free to: - Open an issue on GitHub. - Send me a DM on Discord @macuguita - You are free to use this mod in any Modpack in this platform --- ## Credits - Developer: macuguita
